label: Annex I entities qualifying as medium-sized or large enterprises
description: Entities of a type listed in Annex I (sectors of high criticality) that qualify as medium-sized enterprises (≥50 employees AND ≤€50M turnover or ≤€43M balance sheet) or exceed the ceilings for medium-sized enterprises (≥250 employees OR >€50M turnover OR >€43M balance sheet), and which provide services or carry out activities within the Union. Article 3(4) of Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC (linked/partner enterprise calculations) does not apply.
explicit_exclusions: Public administration entities carrying out activities in areas of national security, public security, defence or law enforcement (Article 2(7))
Entities exempted from Regulation (EU) 2022/2554 scope under Article 2(4) of that Regulation (Article 2(10))
Diplomatic and consular missions of Member States in third countries and their network and information systems located on mission premises or operated for users in a third country

label: Annex II entities qualifying as medium-sized or large enterprises
description: Entities of a type listed in Annex II (other critical sectors) qualifying as medium-sized or large enterprises, providing services or carrying out activities within the Union.
explicit_exclusions: Public administration entities carrying out activities in areas of national security, public security, defence or law enforcement (Article 2(7))

label: Public electronic communications providers — regardless of size
description: Providers of public electronic communications networks or of publicly available electronic communications services that qualify as medium-sized enterprises — in scope regardless of size threshold. Jurisdiction: Member State where services are provided.

label: Trust service providers — regardless of size
description: Trust service providers falling within the scope of Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 — in scope regardless of size.
explicit_exclusions: Trust services provided exclusively within closed systems resulting from national law or from agreements between a defined set of participants (recital 11)
human_review_note: Trust service providers are a subset of the digital_infrastructure sector. A dedicated fact 'is_trust_service_provider' would be cleaner but has been merged into the sector-level scope for simplicity. Reviewer should confirm the entity type classification.

label: TLD name registries and DNS service providers — regardless of size
description: Top-level domain name registries and DNS service providers — in scope regardless of size.
explicit_exclusions: Root name servers are excluded from the definition of DNS service providers (Article 6(20)(b))

label: DNS service providers — regardless of size
description: DNS service providers — in scope regardless of size.

label: Sole provider of essential service — regardless of size
description: An entity that is the sole provider in a Member State of a service which is essential for the maintenance of critical societal or economic activities — in scope regardless of size.

label: Public safety/security/health impact — regardless of size
description: Entities whose disruption could have a significant impact on public safety, public security or public health — in scope regardless of size.

label: Systemic risk impact — regardless of size
description: Entities whose disruption could induce significant systemic risk, in particular for sectors where such disruption could have a cross-border impact — in scope regardless of size.

label: Critical entities under Directive (EU) 2022/2557 — regardless of size
description: Entities identified as critical entities under the CRE Directive (Directive (EU) 2022/2557) — in scope regardless of size.

label: Domain name registration service providers — regardless of size
description: Entities providing domain name registration services (registrars and agents acting on behalf of registrars) — in scope regardless of size.
